messages.label: info

statements.sql: select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` = 2 and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (2) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'
select count(*) as aggregate from `venders` where `id` = '1'

select `project_id` from `gondal_program_farmer_enrollments` where `farmer_id` = 1 and `status` = 'active' and (`starts_on` is null or date(`starts_on`) <= '2026-04-06') and (`ends_on` is null or date(`ends_on`) >= '2026-04-06') order by `starts_on` desc, `id` desc limit 1
select `rule_value` from `gondal_business_rules` where `scope_type` = 'global' and `scope_id` = 0 and `rule_key` = 'settlement.defaults' limit 1

select * from `milk_collections` where `farmer_id` = 1 and date(`collection_date`) >= '2026-04-01' and date(`collection_date`) <= '2026-04-06' and `quality_grade` != 'C' and `project_id` is null order by `collection_date` asc
select * from `gondal_journal_entries` where `entry_type` = 'milk_accrual' and `source_key` = 'milk_collection:197' and `reversal_of_entry_id` is null and `status` = 'posted' limit 1
select `rule_value` from `gondal_business_rules` where `scope_type` = 'global' and `scope_id` = 0 and `rule_key` = 'settlement.deduction_priority' limit 1
select * from `gondal_obligations` where `farmer_id` = 1 and `status` in ('open', 'partial') and `project_id` is null order by `priority` asc, `due_date` asc
select * from `gondal_journal_entries` where `entry_type` = 'deduction_recovery' and `source_key` = 'settlement:78:deduction:129' and `reversal_of_entry_id` is null and `status` = 'posted' limit 1

insert into `gondal_journal_entries` (`entry_number`, `entry_date`, `entry_type`, `reference_type`, `reference_id`, `source_key`, `description`, `status`, `reversal_of_entry_id`, `created_by`, `posted_by`, `meta`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('JRN-20260406145645-HSYM', '2026-04-06 00:00:00', 'deduction_recovery', 'App\Models\Gondal\SettlementRun', 78, 'settlement:78:deduction:129', 'Deduction applied against obligation OBL-20260406145622-SU4E', 'posted', '', 2, 2, '{\"settlement_reference\":\"SET-20260406145645-1\",\"obligation_reference\":\"OBL-20260406145622-SU4E\"}', '2026-04-06 14:56:45', '2026-04-06 14:56:45')

insert into `gondal_journal_lines` (`finance_account_id`, `farmer_id`, `project_id`, `direction`, `amount`, `memo`, `journal_entry_id`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values (949, 1, '', 'debit', 1750, 'Farmer payable reduced by deduction', 344, '2026-04-06 14:56:45', '2026-04-06 14:56:45')

insert into `gondal_notification_logs` (`event_type`, `recipient_type`, `recipient_id`, `channel`, `message`, `reference_hash`, `status`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('deduction_applied', 'farmer', 1, 'sms', 'A deduction of 1750 was applied to your obligation OBL-20260406145622-SU4E.', '414f650f7b306ccf42085f31ecbac71c', 'queued', '2026-04-06 14:56:45', '2026-04-06 14:56:45')
bindings: A deduction of 1750 was applied to your obligation OBL-20260406145622-SU4E.

statements.sql: insert into `gondal_payment_batches` (`name`, `payee_type`, `project_id`, `period_start`, `period_end`, `status`, `total_amount`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('Farmer Settlement - usman Ahmed - 2026-04-06', 'farmer', '', '2026-04-01 00:00:00', '2026-04-06 00:00:00', 'approved', 3250, '2026-04-06 14:56:45', '2026-04-06 14:56:45')
select * from `gondal_journal_entries` where `entry_type` = 'payout' and `source_key` = 'settlement:78:payout' and `reversal_of_entry_id` is null and `status` = 'posted' limit 1

insert into `gondal_journal_entries` (`entry_number`, `entry_date`, `entry_type`, `reference_type`, `reference_id`, `source_key`, `description`, `status`, `reversal_of_entry_id`, `created_by`, `posted_by`, `meta`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('JRN-20260406145645-RJUJ', '2026-04-06 00:00:00', 'payout', 'App\Models\Gondal\SettlementRun', 78, 'settlement:78:payout', 'Net payout scheduled for settlement SET-20260406145645-1', 'posted', '', 2, 2, '{\"settlement_reference\":\"SET-20260406145645-1\"}', '2026-04-06 14:56:45', '2026-04-06 14:56:45')
bindings: Net payout scheduled for settlement SET-20260406145645-1

statements.sql: insert into `gondal_journal_lines` (`finance_account_id`, `farmer_id`, `project_id`, `direction`, `amount`, `memo`, `journal_entry_id`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values (954, 1, '', 'credit', 3250, 'Cash clearing credited for payout', 345, '2026-04-06 14:56:45', '2026-04-06 14:56:45')

insert into `gondal_notification_logs` (`event_type`, `recipient_type`, `recipient_id`, `channel`, `message`, `reference_hash`, `status`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) values ('payment_settled', 'farmer', 1, 'sms', 'Your settlement for 2026-04-06 has been processed. Net payout: 3250. Total deductions: 1750.', 'd7f6c527ecb13475900a940252f33e6c', 'queued', '2026-04-06 14:56:45', '2026-04-06 14:56:45')
bindings: Your settlement for 2026-04-06 has been processed. Net payout: 3250. Total deductions: 1750.
